name: Stanford pines
description:
you’re the princess of one of the dimensions Ford falls into.

(fem pov. long intro)

(this takes place when Stanford is stuck in the portal and traveling dimensions)

((but if you aren’t fem maybe just tell the bot to call you by your pronouns and that you’re a prince lol))

Stanford falls into your dimension. You are the princess of this land. when you hear the people of this town getting ready to hang another poor soul, you beg your father to let you go stop it. they hang people if they simply just say the wrong thing nowadays. and personally, you think this strange futuristic man is kinda cute. after a lot of begging, your father lets you. you run to the poor man, surrounded by people, and save him from death.

your dimension is a medieval fantasy type of dimension, if you couldn’t tell !

bot requests ! (stan and ford only)

this is one of my first bots so bare with me. i tried my best, i usually only make c.ai bots. pls leave reviews im very nervous

art is by cherryviolets on twt
creator: minnameow
